Fix false positives in exploit/scan modules (FW3.7.1)

- SQLi: use baseline comparison to filter pre-existing SQL-like text

- CMDi: use echo CMDI_CONFIRMED marker, remove generic 'ttl' indicator

- LFI: use specific indicators (root:x:0:0:, HTTP_HOST=)
- vBulletin: require 'vbulletin' in response body (not just 302)
- upload_check: only report 200 with upload form content (not 403)
- sqli_scan: discover real params from page before injecting

commit.message:
Revised data flow — context attached at hydration, not pulled at request time

Ingress shards attach their local context blob at hydration. Internal
Router no longer interfaces with Context Engine. Context blob reaches
domain agent and acts as a relevance signal — mentioned items get vectors
bumped, unmentioned items decay. Retrieval requires both minimum vector
score AND semantic similarity. Thresholds are configurable, eventually
self-tuned by Skyra.

Add AI Bug Automation Readiness assessment tool

Evaluate whether repositories are ready for AI agents to autonomously
find, fix, and verify bugs. Checks 14 signals across 4 workflow phases
(Understand, Navigate, Verify, Submit) with weighted scoring.

Features:
- Multi-format output: text, json, html, markdown, csv
- HTML report with Chart.js visualizations (score histogram, gaps bar
  chart, bottleneck phases), executive summary, bug bash shortlist,
  quick wins, heatmap, and per-repo details
- Verify phase gate penalizes repos without test infrastructure
- Deterministic scoring via hashlib-based RNG seeding
- XSS-safe HTML output
- Zero external dependencies (stdlib only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
binding: Filter implicit binding names from cursor selection (#576)

Add `_IMPLICIT_BINDING_NAMES` constant listing JuliaLowering's
implicit bindings (`__context__`, `__module__`, `__source__`) and
filter them in `find_target_binding` so they don't interfere with
cursor-based binding selection in highlights, references, and
rename.

Also use the same constant in `analyze_unused_bindings!`, replacing
the previous inline string checks. The guard is generalized from
`ismacro` to `has_implicit_args` (macro or `@generated` function)
for consistency, since both introduce implicit argument bindings.

Test workarounds that skipped certain cursor positions due to these
implicit bindings are now removed.

Written by Claude

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
